title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Care Ratings

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Care Ratings
jsonLd.description:
Care Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Care Ratings:
Care Ratings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Ratings!
